subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in praise in remembrance of God, the Lord of Names! There hath come before the Wronged One that which thou didst compose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناطق بالثناء فی ذکر الله مالک الاسماء قد حضر لدی المظلوم ما انشاته
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
